testcase.name: test_if_true_branch
testcase.failure: tests/test_control_flow.py:5: in test_if_true_branch assert run("if (1 < 2) { print(\"yes\"); }") == "yes\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.IfStmt'>

testcase.name: test_if_else
testcase.failure: tests/test_control_flow.py:12: in test_if_else assert run(src) == "b\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.IfStmt'>

2
4
5

testcase.failure:
tests/test_control_flow.py:75: in test_nested_loops_break_only_inner assert run(src) == "0 0
0 1
1 0
1 1
" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.LetStmt'>
